violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. -Person at register handling money, single use items and food without a handwash
General food protection. — --Food item was not protected from potential contamination. -Open container of lemonade was stored below air conditioning unit that was in need of cleaning.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution between uses. -2 wet cloths sitting on prep cutting boards.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. -Sink was full with supplies.
General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. -No water on truck.
Water Supply. — --Water source or system was not of sufficient capacity to meet the demands of the food establishment. -Water pump not working.
Approved, safe, unadulterated, approved additives, proper receiving temperature (4 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Method, temperature and time (5 pts deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
